name: verifyax-plugins
description: Official Conscium plugins for working with the VerifyAX agent evaluation platform.

plugins.name: verifyax-api
plugins.description: Drive the VerifyAX agent evaluation platform programmatically — register agents, generate scenarios, run simulations, fetch evaluations.

plugins.name: verifyax-mcp
plugins.description: Conversational access to VerifyAX through an MCP server — register agents, generate scenarios, evaluate, and read results by describing what you want.
